_comment: MANUALLY MAINTAINED — see frontend-react/README.md for the update process. This file seeds the Community Pulse dashboard's Next Meetings widget until the Village publishes a machine-readable calendar (roadmap item, not built yet). Regular schedule: Planning, Zoning & Design Board meets the 2nd Tuesday of each month at 5:30 PM; Village Council meets the 1st and 3rd Wednesday of each month at 9:30 AM. Both at Estero Village Hall, 9401 Corkscrew Palms Circle. Update this list monthly — drop past dates, add the next occurrence(s). Verify against https://estero-fl.gov/agendas-minutes/ before publishing, since holidays/rescheduling do happen.
